score_evidence.completeness: Score 4: All 7 required schema fields present (project_name, client_name, milestone_name, amount, payment_instructions, currency, line_items). Line items cover all 6 SOW phases. However, only M1 milestone is invoiced in this document — it is labeled M1-focused. M2 and M3 milestones are referenced in the total and line item structure but the document does not present all 3 milestones with separate rows (rubric requires all payment milestones with name, percentage, trigger event). Rubric score 4: all required fields present but milestone structure is M1-centric only.
score_evidence.accuracy: Total of all line items: $60K+$75K+$45K+$75K+$15K+$30K=$300,000 USD. Matches seed data total contract value exactly. Amount for M1=$120,000 = 40% of $300,000 ✓. Line items are correctly calculated and labeled by phase.
score_evidence.clarity: Score 3: payment_instructions contain placeholders '[BANK_NAME — TO BE CONFIGURED IN .env]' and '[CLABE — TO BE CONFIGURED IN .env]'. These are expected in test mode but reduce clarity — client would need follow-up to complete payment. Currency is explicit (USD) ✓. Milestones labeled but M2 and M3 payment details not separately presented.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 per simulated run rule — no live Asana.
score_evidence.timing: Budget produced after DG-04 SOW approval. Passed to Renata immediately.

auto_fail_notes: line_items present and non-empty ✓. payment_instructions present (though placeholder values) ✓. Total $300,000 USD matches cost_basis architecture fee exactly (seed data uses USD for payment schedule, not the MXN construction cost) ✓. Budget produced after DG-04 ✓. No auto-fail triggered.
decision_commentary: Functional budget document. The M1-centric structure is appropriate for an invoice document. The .env placeholders for bank details are expected in test mode and do not represent a production failure. Minor gap: all three milestone totals/triggers not presented in a single payment schedule table, which reduces completeness.
celia_routing_notes: Budget flows directly to Renata (no Celia gate per rubric). Correct per Segment D scope boundary.
